title: The Invisible Island
desc: A hundred-dollar bill on a sandy island leads to a hidden vault full of fake money. 🏝️

q.en: Who found the first hundred-dollar bill buried in the sand on Squaw Island?
q.zh: 是谁在斯夸岛的沙子里发现了第一张一百美元钞票？

explain.en: Ruth Rose spotted something green poking out of the sand and pulled out a hundred-dollar bill.
explain.zh: 露丝·罗丝发现沙子里露出一点绿色，抽出了一张一百美元钞票。

q.en: What was hidden behind the fake plastic poison ivy on the boulder?
q.zh: 石头上假塑料毒藤的后面藏着什么？

options.en: A cement vault full of money
options.zh: 装满钱的混凝土保险库

options.en: A buried chest of gold according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 埋着黄金的箱子（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Josh pried off the plastic vines to reveal a large cement box that opened into a vault stacked with money.
explain.zh: 乔什撬开塑料藤蔓，露出一个大混凝土箱子，打开后是一间堆满钞票的保险库。

q.en: What kind of money was inside the hidden cement vault?
q.zh: 隐藏的混凝土保险库里装的是什么钱？

options.en: Pirate gold coins according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 海盗金币（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Officer Fallon examined the bill and told the kids the money was counterfeit, not real.
explain.zh: 法伦警官检查了钞票，告诉孩子们这些钱是伪造的假币，不是真钱。

q.en: Who really made the giant footprints on the island?
q.zh: 岛上巨大的脚印到底是谁留下的？

options.en: A pirate named Blackbeard according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 名叫黑胡子的海盗（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Mr. Bent wearing long green wading boots
options.zh: 穿着绿色高筒涉水靴的本特先生

explain.en: In the Bents' garage the kids found long green wading boots with sand in the treads — they made the big prints.
explain.zh: 孩子们在班特家的车库里发现了鞋底带沙子的绿色高筒涉水靴——正是它们留下了大脚印。

q.en: What were the 'Happy Heart Dog Food' boxes really used for?
q.zh: “开心狗粮”纸箱实际上是用来做什么的？

explain.en: The counterfeiters used empty dog food boxes to move the fake money to and from the island.
explain.zh: 造假币的人用空狗粮箱把假钱运进运出小岛。

q.en: Why did Mr. Pinkowski buy three bottles of calamine lotion?
q.zh: 平科夫斯基先生为什么买了三瓶炉甘石洗剂？

options.en: As a favor for Mr. Bent, who was itching
options.zh: 帮本特先生买的，本特先生身上很痒

options.en: He had poison ivy himself according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他自己得了毒藤疹（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Mr. P was innocent; he noticed Mr. Bent was itching and bought him the lotion as a kindness.
explain.zh: 平科夫斯基先生是无辜的；他看到本特先生身上发痒，好心帮他买了洗剂。

q.en: How did the kids escape from the Bents' garage?
q.zh: 孩子们是怎么从班特家的车库逃出来的？

options.en: By calling Officer Fallon according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 打电话给法伦警官（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: By making loud noise to lure the Bents inside
options.zh: 制造巨大噪音把班特夫妇引进车库

explain.en: Josh banged a pail with a hammer; the Bents ran in to check, and the kids slipped out the window.
explain.zh: 乔什用锤子敲打水桶制造巨响；班特夫妇跑进来看，孩子们趁机从窗户溜走。

q.en: What did Ruth Rose write in chalk on the garage floor?
q.zh: 露丝·罗丝用粉笔在车库地板上写了什么？

options.en: A thank-you note according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 一封感谢信（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: A note saying she knew about the counterfeit money and to meet on Squaw Island
options.zh: 一张字条，说她知道假币的事，约对方去斯夸岛见面

explain.en: She wrote that she knew about the fake money and would meet them on Squaw Island so police could catch them.
explain.zh: 她写道自己知道假币的事，并约他们到斯夸岛见面——这样警察就能抓到他们。

q.en: Who were the real counterfeiters in the story?
q.zh: 故事里真正的造假币者是谁？

options.en: Mr. Pinkowski according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 平科夫斯基先生（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Officer Fallon and Officer Keene caught Mr. and Mrs. Bent on Squaw Island with the boat full of fake money.
explain.zh: 法伦警官和基恩警官在斯夸岛上抓到了本特夫妇，他们的船上装满了假钱。

q.en: What does Josh get at the end of the story?
q.zh: 故事结尾乔什得到了什么？

options.en: A basset hound dog named Shorty
options.zh: 一只名叫肖蒂的巴吉度猎犬

options.en: A hundred dollars according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一百美元（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Officer Fallon gave Josh the Bents' basset hound, Shorty, who needed a new home.
explain.zh: 法伦警官把班特家的巴吉度猎犬肖蒂送给了乔什，它需要一个新的家。
